title: ChatFilterV1
description: A client-side chat filter for Minecraft. Block any words or phrases with /chatfilter add/remove/list
body:
ChatFilterV1 is a lightweight client-side mod for Minecraft that allows you to block any chat messages containing forbidden words or phrases.

With this mod, you have full control over what appears in your chat. It’s especially useful for hiding spam, ads, or any unwanted content.

✨ **Features**

🚫 Filters any chat messages, including your own.

🔧 Easy-to-use commands for managing your filter list.

📋 View all blocked words and phrases at any time.

⚡ Client-side only — servers won’t detect it.

📜 **Commands**

/chatfilter add <text> – add a word or phrase to the filter.

/chatfilter remove <text> – remove a word or phrase from the filter.

/chatfilter list – display all currently blocked words and phrases.

🖥️ **Example Usage**

```
/chatfilter add spam
/chatfilter add ad
/chatfilter list
```



Now all messages containing “spam” or “ad” will be hidden from your chat.
